description: The graph matrix contains a node field rejected by the canonical Graph Matrix schema.
expected_error: does not allow additional property unexpected_schema_field

mutations.replace:
type: "Gate"
    description: "Gate that validates the governed documentation folder and file layout."

  - id: "GATE-DOCS-CHECK"
mutations.with:
type: "Gate"
    description: "Gate that validates the governed documentation folder and file layout."
    unexpected_schema_field: "invalid"

  - id: "GATE-DOCS-CHECK"
